hero.title: Team
hero.description: People behind reproducible, benchmark-driven quant engineering.

members.name: Yu-Hsien Liu
members.bio: Owns CI workflows, repo templates, and review conventions.

members.name: Yuexin Jiang
members.bio: Defines engineering baselines and documents reproducible environment standards.

members.name: Chengfeng Diao
members.bio: Defines benchmark methodology and reporting format for p50, p95, and p99.

members.name: Jordan Shaw
members.bio: Builds FPGA-sim parsers and measures end-to-end latency distribution.

members.name: Noah Park
members.bio: Implements CPU baselines and OpenMP optimization experiments with benchmark reports.

members.name: Elliot Vega
members.bio: Prototypes GPU paths with CuPy and Numba while tracking throughput gains.

members.name: Casey Grant
members.bio: Maintains automation scripts and validates benchmark artifacts before merge.

members.name: Parker Tran
members.bio: Builds simulation validation checks and summarizes latency distributions for reviews.
